name: ironcampaign
description: IronCampaign monorepo root. The load-bearing modules in questlog-critical/ are imported by the server via relative paths, so their third-party deps must resolve from the repo root (Node resolves bare imports by walking up from the importing file's directory, which never reaches server/node_modules). questlog-critical/sync-auth/pairing.js needs argon2; declare it here.
